task: Phase 0 investigation: PM three-view sync root cause (live DB + code trace)

task: PM sync Path A test — submitPMComplete state machine walk
notes: Fix A tried in_progress→closed directly. DB guard rejected it (P0001). State machine requires completed intermediate. Caught in test before prod.

notes: Path A: pm rolled, ticket closed, leaves Open WOs, appears in Service History. Path B: pm_completions source=app-ticket. Backward compat: 419 XLSX rows unaffected. SLA/MTTR unchanged.
